title: Decoding Immune Mechanisms in BCG-unresponsive Non-muscle Invasive Bladder Cancer.
snippet: Non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC) accounts for roughly 75% of all bladder cancer cases. For patients with intermediate- and high-risk disease, intravesical Bacillus Calmette-Guérin (BCG) remains the standard treatment, yet it fails in up to 40% of cases. While radical cystectomy is the most effective salvage option, it carries significant morb...
